name: wmc-marp-template
description: Woodmark Consulting corporate Marp slide template with a branded theme and build-time Mermaid diagram rendering.

scripts.build:rendered: mkdir -p decks/rendered && for d in starter-light starter-dark layout-test-light layout-test-dark; do for ext in pdf html; do marp --config marp.config.mjs decks/$d.md -o decks/rendered/$d.$ext; done; done
